displayText.simplePara: AMPEL360e Wide Tube-and-Wing Family (eWTW) — All variants

remarks.simplePara: Programme-controlled publication and traceability extension. Documents ATLAS-to-CSDB mapping. infoCode 040A subject to BREX/SNS/DMRL freeze. Not for operational use.

levelledPara.title: General
levelledPara.para: This data module describes the S1000D / CSDB Mapping and Traceability framework for the ATLAS 021 — Air Conditioning and Pressurization system of the AMPEL360e eWTW aircraft. It defines how the Q+ATLANTIDE architecture classification maps to S1000D data module codes, SNS structure and CSDB retrieval keys, and documents the responsibility split between the impact analysis layer (Q+ATLANTIDE) and the publication layer (S1000D CSDB).

levelledPara.title: Layer Responsibility Split
levelledPara.para: The eWTW programme uses two complementary layers for system documentation:

listItem.para: Q+ATLANTIDE / ATLAS impact study layer: programme impact analysis, architecture-band effect, risk / opportunity / ESG / lifecycle impact, Q-Division and ORB ownership. Located at: Programmes_example/090_AMPEL360e-Wide-Tube-and-Wing-Family/Q+ATLANTIDE_impact-study/000-099_ATLAS-impact-analysis/020-029_Sistemas-Core-de-Aeronave/021-Conditioning-and-Pressurization/

S1000D CSDB publication layer: authoritative technical publication content in the form of standalone descriptive data modules, each retrieved by DMC from the CSDB. Located at: Programmes_example/090_AMPEL360e-Wide-Tube-and-Wing-Family/Q+ATLANTIDE_impact-study/000-099_ATLAS-impact-analysis/020-029_Sistemas-Core-de-Aeronave/021-Conditioning-and-Pressurization/S1000D-CSDB/DMC/

levelledPara.title: ATLAS to DMC Mapping Table
levelledPara.para: The following table maps ATLAS node sections to S1000D Data Module Codes and ATA SNS reference:

listItem.para: 021-000 (ATA 21-00-00) → DMC-AMPEL360E-EWTW-021-000-00A-040A-D: Air Conditioning and Pressurization — System Description
021-070 (ATA 21-70-00) → DMC-AMPEL360E-EWTW-021-070-00A-040A-D: Moisture and Air Contaminant Control — System Description
021-080 (ATA 21-80-00) → DMC-AMPEL360E-EWTW-021-080-00A-040A-D: ECS Monitoring, Diagnostics and Control Interfaces — Description [programme-controlled-extension]
021-090 (ATA 21-90-00) → DMC-AMPEL360E-EWTW-021-090-00A-040A-D: S1000D / CSDB Mapping and Traceability — Description [programme-controlled-publication-and-traceability-extension]

levelledPara.title: CSDB Source Classification
levelledPara.para: The source classification for this CSDB node is:

listItem.para: Q+ATLANTIDE role: architecture classification and SNS alignment — defines how system nodes are numbered and related.
S1000D role: authoritative technical publication content — standalone data modules containing system descriptions and procedures.
CSDB role: controlled storage, retrieval, issue control and reuse — manages data module versions, applicability and publication output.

levelledPara.title: Traceability and Digital Thread
levelledPara.para: Each data module in this CSDB node is traceable to the corresponding Q+ATLANTIDE impact analysis file via the ATLAS section code (021-000 through 021-090). The digital thread connects requirements (Q+ATLANTIDE impact study) through architecture (ATLAS classification) to technical publication (S1000D CSDB) and onwards to maintenance evidence and lifecycle records.

listItem.para: ATLAS section codes embedded in DMC subSystemCode and subSubSystemCode fields.
ATA SNS alignment providing cross-reference to industry standard numbering.
Programme DMRL linking requirements to data module codes.
CSDB issue and configuration management records.
